lint.command: bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh && bash ci/check-architecture.sh && bash ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh && bash ci/check-orchestrator-layer.sh && python3 scripts/check_flaky_tags.py --tests-root erp-domain/src/test/java --gate gate-fast && bash scripts/guard_openapi_contract_drift.sh

appliedUpdates.description: Normalized the recorded validator commands to repo-relative paths so the scrutiny evidence is replayable from any checkout root instead of only `/home/realnigga/Desktop/Mission-control`.

rejectedObservations.observation: The scrutiny-feature-reviewer Task droid failed to launch for both recovery-local-ci features with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-medium`, so the validator completed both feature reviews manually using mission handoffs and commit diffs and still wrote review artifacts.
